heading: Today
text: Any early snow showers north, changing to rain showers and diminishing.  A chance of morning rain showers south, then periods of sunshine.  Much milder.  Highs in the upper 40s and 50s north, 60 to 65 south.  South to southwest winds 10 to 15 mph, gusting 20 to 30 mph, diminishing to less than 10 mph in the afternoon.

heading: Tonight
text: Periods of rain likely in the evening, possibly changing to snow north late.  Lows in the upper teens and 20s north, in the 30s south.  Winds southwest, shifting to the north and northwest 5 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph late.

heading: Friday
text: Any morning snow or rain showers ending.  Increasing sunshine, blustery, and colder.  Early highs in the 20s to low 30s north, in the 30s to low 40s south, steady or falling.  Northwest winds 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph.
